impact: This advances the PP&D plan by providing a deterministic, commit-safe graph fixture that connects normalized public guidance documents to forms, PDFs, DevHub guides, and Portland Maps references while preserving skipped-link reason codes for later validation.
summary: Add a fixture-only normalized document link graph for public PP&D guidance pages and linked resources.
target_task: Task checkbox-50: Add a fixture-only normalized document link graph that connects public PP&D guidance pages to linked forms, PDFs, DevHub guides, and Portland Maps references with skipped-link reason codes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
